steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The phrase “must not be left to historians alone” signals that history knowledge is essential and necessary—the kind of knowledge the public needs.

steps.title: Match the answer
steps.content: ”Knowledge of history is not superfluous” directly states that history is necessary, explaining why it cannot be left to experts alone. The other choices either mischaracterize what's being evaluated (learnability vs. necessity), reverse the logic (specialized vs. universal), or fail to connect to the context. That matches choice B — B is correct.
